SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR JUL-28-2014 CONTINUED TO JUL-30-2014 AT 9:00 AM IN 220 FOR COURT TRIAL. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE. CLERK: KEVIN DOUGHERTY. (D220).

COURT TRIAL CONCLUDED IN ONE TRIAL DAYS. THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF EAST WEST BANK AND AGAINST DEFENDANT JACK CROUSE. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $542,541.00. LOAN GUARANTEE SIGNED BY DEFENDANT WAS A PERSONAL GUARANTEE AND NOT A GUARENTEE IN HIS ROLE AS TRUSTEE. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE THE FORM OF JUDGMENT AND SUBMIT SAME TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE. CLERK: KEVIN DOUGHERTY. (D220).

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT EAST WEST BANKS ; MEMORANDUM OF POINT AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF CONTINUED FROM JUN-13-2014 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-27-2014, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER STIPULATION OF COUNSEL.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-27-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF EAST WEST BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 7, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 27, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (302)
